violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Per PIC dish machine will be serviced. All dishes must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized in 3-bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Baked goods/ deli sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
